site.title: HumanArchive
site.tagline: Decentralized collective memory archive. Without judgment — only listening.
overview.title: Overview
overview.load_error_html:
Can't load archive/graph.json — run:
python tools/graph_export.py json > archive/graph.json
overview.p1: No verdicts — AI never concludes who is right or wrong.
overview.p2: Never identify anyone — PII is scrubbed before display/index.
overview.p3: Empathy before analysis — trauma is warned, never gated.
overview.p4: Motivation matters more than action — every memory requires it.
overview.p5: Raw data never changes — withdrawn/embargo filter, memory_id = verifiable sha256.
events.title: Events
graph.title: Relation graph
graph.description: Each node is an event; edges are relations (caused_by, part_of, ...). Rendered with Mermaid.
search.title: RAG search
search.description_html: Semantic search over archive/rag_index.json. Queries are PII-scrubbed before embedding (anti identity-probe). Results are role-balanced (anti bias amplification).
search.placeholder: Ask the archive… e.g. why did they release the dam early?
search.index_missing: Index not built yet — run: python tools/rag_query.py --build
search.incompatible_embedder_html: ⚠ Index uses {embedder}. Web UI only matches HashEmbedder. Use CLI python tools/rag_query.py instead.
search.no_hits: No matching memories. Either no one has told this story yet, or they are currently embargoed/withdrawn.
modal.hint: To read a memory in full, open the Obsidian vault or the JSON file in archive/.
footer.ethics_link: See docs/ethics.md for the immutable principles.
submit.title: Contribute a memory
submit.tagline: You don't have to tell us who you are. There is no 'right' or 'wrong' answer — only the truth you lived.
submit.quickstart_1: Fill the form below. All fields except motivation & what happened are optional.
submit.quickstart_2: The form warns if PII is detected. You decide what to keep.
submit.quickstart_3: Click Preview JSON to see the validated memory.
submit.quickstart_4: Click Download to save the file. Submit via PR or email — don't paste to public chats if it contains sensitive info.
submit.quickstart_5: Data stays on your device until you actively send it.
submit.draft_saved: Draft auto-saved to browser. Closing and reopening will restore it.
submit.field.your_motivation: Why did you do/stay/react this way? *
submit.field.pressure: Who or what put pressure on you?
submit.field.embargo: Delay publication until (leave blank for no)
submit.pii.none: ✓ No obvious PII detected (basic check only — review yourself once more).
